section.heading: Moneys in the Rural Electrification and Telephone Revolving Fund

content.p: Moneys in the fund shall remain on deposit in the Treasury of the United States until disbursed.

section.sourceCredit: (May 20, 1936, ch. 432, title III, § 303, as added Pub. L. 93–32, § 2, May 11, 1973, 87 Stat. 67.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective May 11, 1973, see section 12 of Pub. L. 93–32, set out as a note under section 930 of this title.
